title: Dungeons and Taverns Desert Temple Overhaul
description: Overhauls Desert Temples with 4 Variants using new loot tables alongside the Vanilla Loot Tables. The chests at the TNT trap can now turn into exits leading into underground buried rooms for archeology
body:
This mod is part of the [Dungeons and Taverns](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dungeon-and-taverns) series, but **does not require** Dungeons and Taverns to work. The main Dungeons and Taverns mod **does NOT include** this mod's features. If you would like more structures similar to this one, then check [my profile!](https://www.curseforge.com/members/nova_wostra/projects)

- Overhauls the Desert Temple with 4 variations of the Desert Temple
- 4 Husk Prespawn here
- New loot tables alongside the vanilla ones
- Underground rooms connect now to the TNT trap but arent guranteed. up to 4 exits into that section can spawn instead of a chest
